parsed.summary: The commit adds an interactive menu to /glm:setup for already-configured states and renames the npm scope from @anthropic to @anthropics. Changes are confined to documentation (commands/setup.md, release_card.md, CHANGELOG.md), package metadata (package.json, .claude-plugin/*.json), and contain no executable logic, auth boundaries, data mutations, or runtime code paths. No material defects, silent failures, or safety concerns can be substantiated from the diff.
